SMILE INDEX: 69
WINDOW: 992.667s to 1030.367s (smile at 1012.667s to 1015.367s)

TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[722.850-1086.150] interviewee: the border without declaring war and started to enter Poland. But the night before, they bombarded all Polish airports. And for this reason, not one Polish airplane could go up and fight the Germans, all gone. Right in the morning, when I  saw the Germans ordered in, I went to the station and took the last train to Krakow. This was south of Katowice from Silesia. I joined my army.

WORDS AT THE SMILE MOMENT:
and fight the Germans, all gone.

context_segments.speaker: interviewee
context_segments.text: the border without declaring war and started to enter Poland. But the night before, they bombarded all Polish airports. And for this reason, not one Polish airplane could go up and fight the Germans, all gone. Right in the morning, when I  saw the Germans ordered in, I went to the station and took the last train to Krakow. This was south of Katowice from Silesia. I joined my army.
